mapper.select: SELECT * FROM recharge_tier WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM recharge_tier WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recharge_tier(pay_fen, bonus_fen, label, status, sort, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{payFen}, #{bonusFen}, #{label}, #{status}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE recharge_tier SET pay_fen = #{payFen}, bonus_fen = #{bonusFen}, label = #{label}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE recharge_tier SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
